zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Ier d'Avesnes於1218年5月1日出生在比利時盧布格豪法利時，他的父親Bouchard d'Avesnes36歲，母親Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre15歲。他於1246年10月25日與Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇福藍福特 阿姆 麥結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1257年12月24日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯享年39歲，埋葬在荷蘭霍蘭利斯包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Ier d'Avesnes于1218年5月1日出生在比利时盧布格豪法利时，他的父亲Bouchard d'Avesnes36岁，母亲Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre15岁。他于1246年10月25日与Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇福藍福特 阿姆 麥结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1257年12月24日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯享年39岁，埋葬在荷兰霍蘭利斯包格。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Ier d'Avesnes was born on 1 May 1218, in Houffalize, Luxembourg, Belgium, his father, Bouchard d'Avesnes, was 36 and his mother, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, was 15. He married Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen on 25 October 1246, in Frankfurt, Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 December 1257, in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 39, and was buried in Rijnsburg, Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Ier d'Avesnes est né le 1 mai 1218, à Houffalize, Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Bouchard d'Avesnes, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen le 25 octobre 1246, à Frankfurt am Main, Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1257, à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Rijnsburg, Holland, Pays-Bas.

de.Frankfurt, Holy Roman Empire: Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich
de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Ier d'Avesnes am 1. Mai 1218 in Houffalize, Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bouchard d'Avesnes 36 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre 15. Er hat am 25. Oktober 1246 in Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1257 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Rijnsburg, Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Ier d'Avesnes è nato il il 1 maggio 1218 nel Houffalize, Lussemburgo, Belgio, il suo padre, Bouchard d'Avesnes, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen il 25 ottobre 1246, nel Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 dicembre 1257, nel Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Rijnsburg, Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Ier d'Avesnesが1218年5月1日にベルギールクセンボウルグホーウファリズで生まれた時，父Bouchard d'Avesnesは36歳，母Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandreは15歳であった。1246年10月25日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチフランクファート アム メインでAleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1257年12月24日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンスで39歳で死去し，オランダホーランドリジンスブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Frankfurt, Holy Roman Empire: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 프랭k퍼트 아 맹
ko.lifeSummary: Jean Ier d'Avesnes(이)가 1218년 5월 1일 벨기에 루세보우르그 허팔리즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bouchard d'Avesnes(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1246년 10월 25일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 프랭k퍼트 아 맹에서 Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 12월 24일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 홀랜드 리제이스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Ier d'Avesnes nasceu em 1 de maio de 1218, em Houffalize, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Bouchard d'Avesnes, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen em 25 de outubro de 1246, em Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1257, em Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Rijnsburg, Holland, Países Baixos.

ro.Frankfurt, Holy Roman Empire: Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Ier d'Avesnes родился 1 мая 1218 г. в местности хоуффализ, луксембург, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Bouchard d'Avesnes было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen 25 октября 1246 г. в местности Франкфурт-на-Майне, хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 декабря 1257 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности риджнсбург, холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Ier d'Avesnes nació el 1 de mayo de 1218, en Houffalize, Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Bouchard d'Avesnes, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Aleid van Holland gravin van Henegouwen el 25 de octubre de 1246, en Frankfurt am Main, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1257, en Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Rijnsburg, Holland, Países Bajos.
